episodes.title: Part 2 Ahmedi Religion of peace and light exposed!!
episodes.description: Welcome to the second part of my deep dive into the Ahmedi Religion of peace and light ARPOL aka the Beanie cult. In Episode 2 I am going right back to the beginning again as more information has just come to light. Who was Abdullah Hashem as a young man and what is the truth behind the Raelism UFO cult? Go grab your chai as we go through the details together. Part 3 coming soon. #cult #history #religion #expose #documentry #beanie #crewe #facts #truthmatters #fame
subjects: Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light

episodes.title: Ahmedi peace and light cult exposed!!!   Who is Abdullah Hashem part1
episodes.description:
In part one of this series we will look at who Abdullah Hashem is and how he rose to fame before he started his cult.

Strangely there seems to be very little information on Hashrm’s family and childhood but I have pieced together what I can. 
Who is the man behind this new cult the Ahmed religion of peace and light? #ahmedi #crewe #history #expose #egyptian #american #religion #abdullah #beaniehat
subjects: Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light
